{"BaseResp":{"Extra":{"traceparent":"02-1f6e5681ef637fb65fe5b4e05fc41e4b-54f0c47d2977bf26-05"},"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":46372},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7251067518780621608","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"只能说是我看过的所有小说中最精彩的一部，没有一点废话，节奏紧凑，井然有序，主要围绕主人公的叙述。非常精彩，让人浮想联翩，回味无穷！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1688270789,"group_id":"7112656623956397088","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心之所向便是光","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzqtBSBB34e4P5bdaAk3ceiWZoFDTeKTS9Klc3ZP+hDt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/53f1dedf48fd4913a12a088dc5aa307f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618378&x-signature=vm%2F2XKJGDH7GKx9%2FQhNJBJ4QkTs%3D","user_id":"4169767427245135","user_name":"无心HP"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4169767427245135","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7112656623956397088","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌文，每一个字都爽，剧情节奏爆快，不拖拉，杀伐果断】毕业酒席上，父母兄弟惨死，遭遇追杀，侥幸逃生，昆仑山上习武五年，我强势归来！

　　“你是顶尖阔少，我惹不起你？我师父一巴掌可以拍死！”

　　“你是中医之王？我师父乃鬼门传人，十三针定天下人生死！”

　　“你是宗师武者，一人之下，万人之上？我师父坐镇昆仑，天下宗师来拜！”

　　“你是江南王，权倾天下？我师父曾为帝师，是你上司的上司！”

　　“你亿万家产，左右世界金融走向？我师父掌控印钞机，你的钱是他发行的！”

  　　这样的无敌师傅，叶北辰有99个。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/79350e404e385a6e954099f59e5a882c","author":"求求你让我火吧","author_id":"","book_id":"7112656623956397088","book_name":"我百位无敌师父，你怎么跟我斗？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"44万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":845,"name":"高手下山","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=845&name=高手下山&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7112656835655827976","read_count":"439668","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5441324"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"2468","tags":"都市修真,都市,多女主,无敌,无脑爽,高手下山,神医","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d67e32f265df4c017d38aa2cf7891485~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779250982&x-signature=xFFZcF13Tzs4VfQxaq%2FIxdqzGBo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4111781150332340","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.46734393e+08"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41小时后点评"} 　　“你是顶尖阔少，我惹不起你？我师父一巴掌可以拍死！”

　　“你是中医之王？我师父乃鬼门传人，十三针定天下人生死！”

　　“你是宗师武者，一人之下，万人之上？我师父坐镇昆仑，天下宗师来拜！”

　　“你是江南王，权倾天下？我师父曾为帝师，是你上司的上司！”

　　“你亿万家产，左右世界金融走向？我师父掌控印钞机，你的钱是他发行的！”

"stat":{"digg_count":1078,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35331,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":89752},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1663905526,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7167413428158759715","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说写的好！叶北辰这个人物写的有个性，惩恶扬善，见义勇为，有担当，同情弱者，正能量。特别是抗倭的部分让人振奋，是一部爱国的书，值得一看。作者辛苦了，谢谢。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668793771,"group_id":"7112656623956397088","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2lOZY2oHi7qNoaS/sfShE8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617805&x-signature=tKjbkp0JAbrDpUCor58zq965eto%3D","user_id":"377831961397101","user_name":"蜀山剑宫的周家老祖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"377831961397101","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7112656623956397088","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌文，每一个字都爽，剧情节奏爆快，不拖拉，杀伐果断】毕业酒席上，父母兄弟惨死，遭遇追杀，侥幸逃生，昆仑山上习武五年，我强势归来！

　　“你是顶尖阔少，我惹不起你？我师父一巴掌可以拍死！”

　　“你是中医之王？我师父乃鬼门传人，十三针定天下人生死！”

　　“你是宗师武者，一人之下，万人之上？我师父坐镇昆仑，天下宗师来拜！”

　　“你是江南王，权倾天下？我师父曾为帝师，是你上司的上司！”

　　“你亿万家产，左右世界金融走向？我师父掌控印钞机，你的钱是他发行的！”
